title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF STO. NIÃO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MAGALANG, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3201 / 57 OG No. 7, 1193 (February 13, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2797, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF STO. NIÃO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MAGALANG, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Balas in the Municipality of Magalang, Province of Pampanga, is converted into a barrio of said municipality, to be known as the barrio of Sto. Niño.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
